prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年海南省综合类最低位次分别为3990→4018→4464→5168→5572，呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约1582名，年均后移约395名；2025年基准位次约5572名；该校在海南省综合类招生计划2021–2022年35人，2023–2025年36人，2026年增至39人，较2025年扩招约8.33%，扩招幅度较大，理论上使竞争略有缓和 ，位次有后移倾向。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第83名，近年排名稳定在80–85区间，属中上水平211；2026年高 考周期声誉评价为偏负面，涉及师德师风相关事件，对报考热度有轻微抑制作用；抖音热度排名第51位（较热），短视频曝光量中等，未出现明显爆火或断档信号；风景园林学获评A+（第五轮学科评估），为该校唯一A-及以上学科，在全国处于顶尖水平，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通 信、电气工程等社会热门专业持续偏热，但该校以农林为特色，相关专业热度一般；海南省2026年考生总数约78000人（较2025年67408人增加约15.7%），考生规模显著扩大，竞 争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划扩招约8.33%使位次有后移动力、但 海南省考生总数大幅增加约15.7%加剧竞争形成前移对冲，以及声誉偏负面轻微抑制热度，在2025年基准5572名基础上，预测2026年最低位次约5821名，区间5321–6321名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 法学
- 计算机类（包含计算机科学与技术、数字媒体技术、数据科学与大数据技术等）
- 风景园林
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 园林
- 工商管理类（包含会计学、工商管理、人力资源管理、物业管理）
- 林学类（包含林学、森林保护、经济林等）
- 机械设计制造及其自动化
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 林业工程类（包含林产化工、木材科学与工程等）
- 环境科学
- 食品科学与工程
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约5821名，区间5321–6321名。建议位次在区间下限（5321名）以内的考生可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（风景园林、法学、计算机类）；位次在区间中段（约5800名）的考 生以二档专业为主力选择，兼顾一档冲刺；位次在区间上限（6321名）附近的考生以三档专业保底，争取二档中位次要求较低的专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for comprehensive subjects in Hainan Province were 3990 → 4018 → 4464 → 5168 → 5572, showing a continuous backward trend. Over the past 4 years, the cumulative backward shift is approximately 1582 places, with an average annual backward shift of about 395 places. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 5572. The enrollment plan for this university in Hainan Province was 35 students in 2021–2022, 36 students in 2023–2025, and will increase to 39 students in 2026, an expansion of about 8.33% compared to 2025. This relatively large expansion theoretically eases competition slightly, leading to a tendency for rankings to shift backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 83rd, with a stable ranking in the 80–85 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities. The reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, involving incidents related to teacher ethics and style, which mildly suppresses application enthusiasm. Douyin popularity ranking is 51st (relatively hot), with moderate short video exposure, showing no obvious signs of explosive popularity or gaps. Landscape Architecture was rated A+ (fifth round of discipline evaluation), the only discipline at this university rated A- or above, ranking at the top level nationally, which has some appeal for applications to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Socially popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be hot, but this university, with its focus on agriculture and forestry, has generally moderate popularity for related majors. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Hainan Province is approximately 78,000 (an increase of about 15.7% from 67,408 in 2025), indicating a significant expansion in the candidate pool and intensified competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the planned enrollment expansion of about 8.33% in 2026 (which drives rankings backward), the significant increase in the total number of examinees in Hainan Province by about 15.7% (which intensifies competition and creates a forward shift offset), and the slightly negative reputation mildly suppressing enthusiasm, based on the 2025 baseline of 5572, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 5821, with a range of 5321–6321.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Law
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, Digital Media Technology, Data Science and Big Data Technology, etc.)
- Landscape Architecture
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Landscape Gardening
- Business Administration (including Accounting, Business Administration, Human Resource Management, Property Management)
- Forestry (including Forestry, Forest Protection, Economic Forest, etc.)
- Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Forestry Engineering (including Forest Chemical Engineering, Wood Science and Engineering, etc.)
- Environmental Science
- Food Science and Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 5821, with a range of 5321–6321. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (5321 or better) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Landscape Architecture, Law, Computer Science). Candidates with rankings around the middle of the range (approximately 5800) should prioritize Tier 2 majors as their main choice, while also attempting Tier 1 as a reach. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (6321) should use Tier 3 majors as safety options, and strive for Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements.
